testcase.name: ChromeBrowserTest

failure.message: Chrome title verification failed! expected [Holland & Barrett - UK's Leading Health & Wellbeing Store] but found [Holland & Barrett - UK's Leading Health & Wellness Shop]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Chrome title verification failed! expected [Holland & Barrett - UK's Leading Health & Wellbeing Store] but found [Holland & Barrett - UK's Leading Health & Wellness Shop] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at testcase.name: DropDownList
